allow: Bash(awk -F= '/^[A-Za-z]/ { key=$1; val=substr\($0, index\($0,"="\)+1\); if \(length\(val\)>0\) { mask=substr\(val,1,4\) "…\(" length\(val\) " chars\)" } else { mask="\(empty\)" }; printf "%-32s %s\\n", key, mask }' .env.local)
Bash(echo "exit=$? \(124 = started and waited, which is correct\)")
